# web/lib/contracts/

ABI exports for use in API and FE code.

**Do not edit by hand.** Auto-generated from `contracts/out/*` by `scripts/export-abi.ts`.

After any contract change, run from repo root:

```bash
bun run export-abi
git add web/lib/contracts/
```

CI checks that this directory is in sync with the latest Foundry build.
